Hydroxymethylbilane synthase performs pyrrolylmethyl chain elongation with a dipyrromethane cofactor outside the current seed fingerprint set.
Aristolochene synthase performs terpene carbocation cyclization chemistry outside the current hydrolase and cofactor-redox seed fingerprints.
Trichodiene synthase uses magnesium-associated diphosphate departure and terpene carbocation rearrangement rather than metal-activated hydrolysis.
Epi-isozizaene synthase catalyzes terpene carbocation cyclization and rearrangement outside the current hydrolase and cofactor seed definitions.
Squalene synthase performs prenyl diphosphate coupling and NAD(P)H-linked reduction chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
5-epi-aristolochene synthase performs magnesium-assisted terpene carbocation cyclization rather than metal-activated hydrolysis.
N4-(beta-N-acetylglucosaminyl)-L-asparaginase uses N-terminal threonine nucleophile chemistry outside the Ser-His-Asp/Glu hydrolase seed.
Dihydrodipicolinate synthase uses lysine Schiff-base aldol condensation and cyclization chemistry rather than PLP-dependent or hydrolase seed chemistry.
Methionine synthase uses methylcobalamin heterolytic methyl transfer rather than adenosylcobalamin radical rearrangement in the current cobalamin seed.
Muconate cycloisomerase performs metal-associated cycloisomerization through enolate chemistry rather than metal-activated hydrolysis.
Ribulose-phosphate 3-epimerase performs metal-associated sugar epimerization through enolate chemistry outside the metal-hydrolase seed.
Phosphoenolpyruvate mutase performs phosphoryl-transfer and metaphosphate chemistry rather than Ser-His-Asp/Glu hydrolysis.
Isocitrate lyase performs carbon-carbon lyase and condensation chemistry outside the current hydrolase and cofactor seed fingerprints.

Pyruvate oxidase contains proximal FAD and carries out flavin-mediated electron transfer after TPP-supported pyruvate oxidation, fitting the broad flavin redox seed.
